title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 103.057 - False statement or falsifying record of plan, penalty
text:
103.057.  False statement or falsifying record of plan, penalty. — A person who knowingly makes a false statement, or falsifies or permits to be falsified a record of the plan, in an attempt to defraud the plan is subject to fine or imprisonment under the laws of this state.
(L. 1992 H.B. 1574 § 1 subsec. 23)
